name: Courgette and Aubergine with Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 small courgette (zucchini), halved and thinly sliced, about 200g
1 small aubergine (eggplant), halved and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
For US-Americans: courgette = zucchini; aubergine = eggplant.
Combine the pork with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Heat the oil in a wok or large frying pan.
Add the meat and garlic; stir-fry until the meat is browned.
Remove the meat from the pan and set aside, keeping it warm.
In the same pan, stir-fry the onion for about 2 minutes.
Add the courgette and aubergine; stir-fry over high heat for about 4 minutes, until they are browned.
Return the meat to the pan.
Stir in the yogurt; heat through without boiling.
Serve over brown rice.
Yield: 4 servings, approximately 205 calories per serving
